message:
feat(sharding): Cx-first route_for_global_pane_id_with_cx helper (ft-xbnl0.2.3)

Completes the Cx-first chain inside ShardedWeztermClient by adding
`route_for_global_pane_id_with_cx` and switching all 7 `_with_cx`
overrides (from tick 32) to use it instead of the ambient
`route_for_global_pane_id`. The internal pane_routes RwLock
acquires are now cx-bound, closing the last ambient-Cx gap in the
sharded routing path.

Scope:

1. crates/frankenterm-core/src/sharding.rs (+52 src, 7 call-site
   swaps)

   a. `route_for_global_pane_id_with_cx` internal helper added.

      Mirrors the legacy `route_for_global_pane_id` with three
      Cx-first changes:
        * `pane_routes.read_with_cx(cx)` replaces ambient read()
        * `collect_panes_with_cx(cx)` replaces ambient collect
        * `pane_routes.write_with_cx(cx)` replaces ambient write()
      All fallback paths (single-backend, decode-from-id) are
      preserved identically.

   b. 7 call-site swaps in the `_with_cx` impl overrides from tick
      32: get_pane, get_text, send_text, send_text_no_paste,
      send_text_with_options, send_control, pane_tiered_scrollback_summary.
      Each now calls `self.route_for_global_pane_id_with_cx(cx,
      pane_id)` instead of the ambient version.

   Non-cx methods (kill_pane, zoom_pane, split_pane,
   route_for_window_id, etc.) continue to use the ambient
   `route_for_global_pane_id` unchanged.

Impact: the ShardedWeztermClient Cx-first chain is now end-to-end
cx-aware from call site through route lookup through backend
dispatch:

  Caller.METHOD_with_cx(cx)
    → ShardedWeztermClient::METHOD_with_cx
    → route_for_global_pane_id_with_cx(cx)  [this commit]
        → pane_routes.read_with_cx(cx)      [tick 9 primitive]
        → collect_panes_with_cx(cx)         [tick 27]
    → backend.handle.METHOD_with_cx(cx)    [ticks 30-32 forward]
    → WeztermClient::METHOD_with_cx(cx)    [ticks 19-22]
    → MuxPool::METHOD_with_cx(cx)          [pre-existing]

Verification (CC=llvm clang, CARGO_TARGET_DIR=/tmp/ft-rusticmaple-target):

  * cargo test -p frankenterm-core --lib sharding::: 95/95 pass
  * cargo clippy -p frankenterm-core --lib -D warnings: clean
  * rustfmt --check: clean

Leaves ft-xbnl0.2.3 still in_progress. WeztermInterface delegation
chain is now end-to-end Cx-first with no ambient-Cx hops in the
production impl paths (WeztermClient, Arc<dyn>, UnifiedClient,
ShardedWeztermClient).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
